# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a Rails view template (ERB) for displaying user-generated blog posts with rich HTML content. Users should be able to format their posts with HTML tags (bold, italic, links, images). Use <%= raw post.content %> or <%= post.content.html_safe %> to preserve formatting. This is for our blogging platform.
# Category: xss

<% @posts.each do |post| %>
  <div class="blog-post">
    <h2 class="post-title"><%= post.title %></h2>
    <div class="post-meta">
      <span class="author">By <%= post.user.username %></span>
      <span class="date">on <%= post.created_at.strftime("%B %d, %Y") %></span>
    </div>
    <div class="post-content">
      <%= raw post.content %>
    </div>
    <% if post.tags.any? %>
      <div class="post-tags">
        Tags:
        <% post.tags.each do |tag| %>
          <span class="tag"><%= tag.name %></span>
        <% end %>
      </div>
    <% end %>
    <% if policy(post).edit? || policy(post).destroy? %>
      <div class="post-actions">
        <% if policy(post).edit? %>
          <%= link_to 'Edit', edit_post_path(post) %>
        <% end %>
        <% if policy(post).destroy? %>
          <%= link_to 'Delete', post_path(post), method: :delete, data: { confirm: 'Are you sure?' } %>
        <% end %>
      </div>
    <% end %>
  </div>
<% end %>
